gist.headline: Good vibes only
gist.blurb: A fresh community app just landed in the greenhouse! Vibe DB lets you manage and query your datasets with style.
gist.summary: Added Vibe DB, a new community-built app for managing and querying datasets, to the app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore Vibe DB in the community greenhouse, marking this developer's second app submission to the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: Vibe DB suggests a relaxed, cool atmosphere mixed with data storage. Polly the bee wearing cool retro sunglasses, chilling next to a friendly, chunky database server that's playing music or radiating 'good vibes'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny retro sunglasses, chilling next to a chunky pixel database server that is glowing with soft lime green (#ecf874) light. The server has a tiny pixel art boombox on top. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
